message: fix: stabilize provider sidebar subtitle height

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+import AppKit
 import SwiftUI
 
 enum ProviderSettingsMetrics {
@@ -13,6 +14,12 @@ enum ProviderSettingsMetrics {
     static let pickerLabelWidth: CGFloat = 92
     static let sidebarWidth: CGFloat = 240
     static let sidebarCornerRadius: CGFloat = 12
+    static let sidebarSubtitleHeight: CGFloat = {
+        let font = NSFont.systemFont(ofSize: NSFont.smallSystemFontSize)
+        let layout = NSLayoutManager()
+        return ceil(layout.defaultLineHeight(for: font) * 2)
+    }()
+
     static let detailMaxWidth: CGFloat = 640
     static let metricLabelWidth: CGFloat = 120
     static let metricBarWidth: CGFloat = 220

@@ -89,6 +89,7 @@ private struct ProviderSidebarRowView: View {
                     .font(.caption)
                     .foregroundStyle(.secondary)
                     .lineLimit(2)
+                    .frame(height: ProviderSettingsMetrics.sidebarSubtitleHeight, alignment: .topLeading)
             }
 
             Spacer(minLength: 8)
